heroHeadline:
Real Estate Advisory
for Diplomatic Missions
heroSubtext: Strategic housing, acquisition, and long-term stewardship in global capitals.
heroDescription: We advise diplomatic, foreign and private organizations on real estate decisions in New York, helping balance financial responsibility, operational needs, and long-term presence.

approachCards.title: Long-Term Lens
approachCards.text: Diplomatic housing decisions are rarely short-term. We evaluate real estate through a multi-decade horizon, accounting for cost, risk, continuity, and asset value.

approachCards.title: Dual Audience
approachCards.text: We work with both headquarters and local missions, ensuring alignment between strategic objectives and on-the-ground realities.

approachCards.title: Discretion & Precision
approachCards.text: Our advisory work is deliberate, analytical, and discreet. We prioritize clarity over speed and outcomes over volume.

servicesSubtext: Our work spans the full lifecycle of diplomatic real estate — from strategic planning through acquisition to ongoing stewardship.
aboutParagraphs: Our advisory practice grew out of years working with diplomatic missions, international organizations, and global clients navigating New York's real estate market.

We combine market expertise with an understanding of diplomatic process, institutional decision-making, and long-term stewardship — helping missions operate with confidence in one of the world's most complex cities.
ctaSubtext: We advise quietly, plan across decades, and measure success by stability, continuity, and outcomes over time.
